name: MapR5CodeSearchSupportForR4
title: Cross-version ConceptMap for ValueSet R5-code-search-support-for-R4 from FHIR R5 to FHIR R4
description: This ConceptMap represents the cross-version mapping of concepts from ValueSet `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/code-search-support|5.0.0` for use in FHIR R4.

target.comment:
Using explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/code-search-support|5.0.0` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/code-search-support|4.3.0` as Equivalent in `http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/xver/5.0/ConceptMap/R5-CodeSearchSupport-R4B-CodeSearchSupport` (`ConceptMap-R5-CodeSearchSupport-R4B-CodeSearchSupport.json`)
Using explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/code-search-support|4.3.0` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/code-search-support|4.0.1` as Equivalent in `http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/xver/4.3/ConceptMap/R4B-CodeSearchSupport-R4-CodeSearchSupport` (`ConceptMap-R4B-CodeSearchSupport-R4-CodeSearchSupport.json`)

Using explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/code-search-support|5.0.0` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/code-search-support|4.3.0` as Equivalent in `http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/xver/5.0/ConceptMap/R5-CodeSearchSupport-R4B-CodeSearchSupport` (`ConceptMap-R5-CodeSearchSupport-R4B-CodeSearchSupport.json`)
Using explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/code-search-support|4.3.0` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/code-search-support|4.0.1` as Equivalent in `http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/xver/4.3/ConceptMap/R4B-CodeSearchSupport-R4-CodeSearchSupport` (`ConceptMap-R4B-CodeSearchSupport-R4-CodeSearchSupport.json`)
